title: story.heartbeat
description: Emitted by story-task-progress.js (4-tier) or story-lifecycle.js (3-tier) inside a Story's implementation loop. Surfaces the in-progress Story as an inspectable ledger event so /epic-deliver's host-loop reconciler can confirm a long Story is still making forward progress between dispatch and merge — distinct from story.dispatch.start (one per Story per attempt) and story.merged (one per Story per close). Under 3-tier the Story has no child Task tickets, so the legacy Task-counter fields (taskId, tasksDone, tasksTotal, currentTaskId) are all optional and MAY be omitted; under 4-tier they MAY be present so retros can reconstruct per-Task wall-clock cadence.
